title: Infested Automaton
description:
There's a chamber filled with [red]dead robots[/red].

A lone automaton still has a [sine][aqua]faintly glowing core[/aqua][/sine] but it's engulfed by a grotesque, organic growth and doesn't respond.
notes: Both options offer exactly 1 random card drawn from the character's card pool. [gold]Study[/gold] filters for [gold]Power[/gold]-type cards only. [gold]Touch the Core[/gold] filters for cards with a canonical energy cost of [blue]0[/blue] (excluding X-cost cards).
